NARRATOR.description: George — Warm, Captivating Storyteller. British, middle-aged. Perfect for literary narration.
NARRATOR.why: narrative_story use case, warm and measured, the novel's register

CASS.description: Liam — young male. Energetic but can be restrained.

EDDAN.description: Brian — Deep, Resonant and Comforting. Middle-aged.
EDDAN.why: deep and resonant matches the bellwright patriarch. The comfort is right for workshop scenes.

PERIN.why: steady and measured. Perin is precise, dry, controlled after 10 years of Corda service.

LENNE.description: Jessica — Playful, Bright, Warm. Young female.
LENNE.why: bright and quick matches Lenne's intellectual energy. Young voice.

TORVALD.description: Bill — Wise, Mature, Balanced. Old male.
TORVALD.why: old, wise — the 63-year-old dye merchant. Gravelly warmth.

MARET.description: Lily — Velvety Actress. British, middle-aged female.
MARET.why: controlled, precise, powerful presence. Maret's stillness.

DAV_SORN.why: formal trained voice for the Court Singer. Smooth but can be clipped.

PROCTOR_FEN.description: Roger — Laid-Back, Casual, Resonant. Middle-aged male.
PROCTOR_FEN.why: dry, archly amused pedagogue. The casual resonance fits.

MIRA_FEN.description: Alice — Clear, Engaging Educator. British, middle-aged female.
MIRA_FEN.why: Academy scholar, 60s, precise. Educational voice matches.

VELLA.why: Court Singer, formal, weighted. Professional matches.

OSSIAN.why: nervous, eager student. Young voice, can be less confident.

MINOR.description: Roger — utility voice for unnamed characters.
MINOR.why: neutral enough for merchants, clerks, minor parts.
